name: pr-babysitter
description: Watch open PRs for new activity every 15m
prompt:
Check open PRs for new activity. Run `gh pr list --author @me --state open --json number,title,url 2>/dev/null` to find your PRs. For each, check for new review comments or CI status changes since last check.

Previous state: {state}

If new blocking comments or CI failures: report them clearly.
If nothing changed: output [~].
Update state with current PR statuses via RoutineSetState.
